description_long: This is a modern, front-loading washing machine with a rectangular, boxy shape and a clean, white exterior. The front panel features a large circular glass door with a dark gray rim, allowing a view into the drum. Above the door, the control panel spans the width of the machine and includes several round buttons, a digital display, and a rotary dial for selecting wash cycles. To the left of the control panel is a pull-out detergent drawer, and subtle branding is visible above it. The sides and back of the machine are plain and unadorned, with smooth, flat surfaces. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for placement in urban environments such as laundromats, apartment basements, or garages.
description: A white, front-loading washing machine with a large glass door, a detailed control panel, and a pull-out detergent drawer. The design is modern and functional, with smooth surfaces and clear user interfaces.
description_view_0: The front view shows the circular glass door, control panel with buttons, display, rotary dial, and the detergent drawer, as well as subtle branding.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a plain, smooth surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a completely flat, featureless back panel, emphasizing the machine's boxy shape.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a plain, unadorned surface with no controls or openings.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front of the machine, featuring a row of round buttons, a digital display, a rotary dial, and a pull-out detergent drawer on the left. The layout is linear and user-friendly, with clear separation between controls.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, circular glass door with a dark gray rim and a visible handle integrated into the rim.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is visible above the detergent drawer on the left side of the control panel, with the text 'BRAND' and a small symbol.
attribute_detergent_drawer_location: The detergent drawer is visible on the upper left side of the front panel, directly above the door and integrated into the control panel.
attribute_drum_visibility: The drum is partially visible through the glass door, showing a blue-tinted interior.
